channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: The signal bitcoin momentum traders have been waiting for is here
item.description: What you need to know for April 22, 2026

item.title: Coinbase shifts New York prediction markets fight to federal court
item.description: Coinbase legal chief Paul Grewal says the company removed New York’s prediction markets lawsuit to federal court, setting up a sharper fight over CFTC authority and state gambling laws.

item.title: PENGU Notches Double-Digit Gains as Bitcoin Hits $78K Amid $418M Liquidation Spree
item.description: The crypto market outlook improved as altcoins rallied amid Bitcoin's $78,000 retest, but experts remain cautious.

item.title: Bitcoin tests $78,000 resistance as short-squeeze risks mount, altcoins rally
item.description: BTC hovers at key $78,000 level with $180 million liquidations at stake, while altcoins and memecoins surge as risk-on sentiment returns.

item.title: Justin Sun Sues Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Over Frozen Tokens
item.description: The Tron founder says World Liberty froze his tokens, stripped his voting rights, and threatened to burn his holdings. Now he's suing.

item.title: Bitcoin 'Bull Score' hits six-month high as 2022 bear-market fears linger
item.description: Bitcoin price metrics saw a broad recovery in April, but analysis warns that the 2022 bear-market breakdown could still repeat.

item.title: Another DeFi protocol hacked as Sui-based Volo hit by $3.5M exploit
item.description: Volo Protocol has confirmed a $3.5 million exploit affecting select vaults, adding that it has frozen assets and started fund recovery efforts amid ongoing investigation.

item.title: Flight to safety: How Maker’s Spark and USDC are winning the $10 billion Aave breakup
item.description: Funds leaving Aave are splitting across safer lending, simpler ETH exposure and off-chain yield, with stablecoins acting as a temporary refuge.

item.title: Uzbekistan creates state-backed crypto mining zone with tax breaks
item.description: Uzbekistan has created a supervised crypto mining zone in Karakalpakstan, allowing foreign sales while requiring proceeds to flow through local bank accounts.

item.title: Traders don’t see Kelp socializing losses after $292 million exploit
item.description: Polymarket prices low odds of a system-wide redistribution, as the protocol weighs how to handle an undercollateralized rsETH supply

item.title: Stratiphy reopens tax-free route to crypto ETNs for UK investors
item.description: Stratiphy is reopening a tax-free route to crypto ETNs in the UK after HMRC’s ISA rule change left retail investors with little practical access.

item.title: There's no need to stress, markets are eagerly going up for #Bitcoin. Strong momentum and lower-timeframe technical signals suggest a continuation on the horizon. Most likely, it will stall for a second. Why? The crucial resistance at $79K has a lot of sells/shor - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBuR0pFd1AxT19LUnFfNlFWT1ZIMXB5Ukc3clROWXRJc0hJMS10V01QNExoX21XZEJyYzBpSW4wb3AzSlFNaWpLUkpvYURtNzlTdklXRkFTMk4yemJ2MlRKM1FPdw?oc=5" target="_blank">There's no need to stress, marke…

item.title: A make or break moment: why $79,200 could act as a launchpad or a ceiling for bitcoin
item.description: True Market Mean and Short-Term Holder cost basis form a critical $78.2K to $79.2K range that could define the next major move.

item.title: I strongly advise no one to ever give Bitcoin Depot ATMs your business. -Why was an elderly fraud victim recently allowed to convert $25K fiat to BTC via Bitcoin Depot ATM in the US? -Why was the victim quoted at $108K per BTC when market price is $75K? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE8zblpkcXMyM3diWEZNMFBHekRfcXlfR0RZSUphREdyWGxkVzg4cFJiUC1KV1oxSDdrVVFVQzVuVmMwYzRnbFRHUXlQSDZlWDRLbUFZTGVOSDJjNDg2?oc=5" target="_blank">I strongly advise no one to ever give Bitc…

item.title: Another DeFi protocol loses millions in hack days after KelpDAO breach
item.description: Volo Protocol lost about $3.5 million from three vaults holding WBTC, XAUm, and USDC.

item.title: AI drives surge in ‘bug bounty’ reports, but ‘slop’ is rising too
item.description: HackerOne, one of the largest bug bounty platforms in the world, reported there were 85,000 valid bounty submissions in 2025, up 7% from the previous year.

item.title: Bitcoin's 'Coinbase premium' just posted its longest bullish streak since October's record high of $126,000
item.description: Bitcoin's Coinbase premium has been positive for 14 straight days, the longest bullish streak since BTC hit its all time high of $126,000 in October.

item.title: Privacy protocol Umbra shuts front end to stifle Kelp exploiters
item.description: Umbra has shut down its front end to stop hackers, but says it can’t stop the use of its smart contracts or another version of its open-source front end.

item.title: US law firm apologizes after AI hallucinations made it to legal filing
item.description: Sullivan & Cromwell’s Andrew Dietderich said the company has AI policies to prevent incorrect citations and other errors, but procedures weren’t followed on this occasion.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $78,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1RdlkxTjhTY0dLbGdWXy1CaXdfbTdRVTJtVVR2a3N3YzR1aEVxMENlVVVPQXdtQndNbThDV19PbzZGM0swN0RJR0FkaUJka1B1RWlaSy1lVzlIdFpfNFFIRUJR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $78,000<…

item.title: Bitcoin climbs to $78,100 on Trump ceasefire extension, Strategy's $2.5 billion buy
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $77,541 on Wednesday morning, up 2.2% over 24 hours and 4.3% on the week, after Trump extended the Iran ceasefire and Strategy disclosed its largest BTC purchase in 17 months.

item.title: Tron's Justin Sun sues Trump-linked World Liberty Financial over frozen assets
item.description: World Liberty unfairly froze Sun's $WLFI tokens and threatened him, the lawsuit alleged.

item.title: BlackRock bought $900 Million of Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1JSnd1VWctYkdGdzZrTWo3RVJiclJLckJuV1M4dkVtc0JDYnJjODFQWUNWcmpXb0hMTU5nQVZyejBjSV9TaUNJUGdzdEFyTU9wTUthQkkycTE1cUk?oc=5" target="_blank">BlackRock bought $900 Million of Bitcoin</a…

item.title: Chinese crypto mogul Li Lin’s private trading arm is set to move into a Hong Kong-listed wealth firm
item.description: The transfer effectively moves part of Li’s private trading operation into a public company where he is the largest shareholder.

item.title: Coinbase highlights Algorand, Aptos' work to mitigate quantum threat
item.description: Coinbase’s quantum advisory board says quantum computing isn’t yet a threat, but has urged for upgrade work to begin, with some blockchains being less prepared than others.

item.title: FTX Liquidators Sold Cursor Stake for $200K. SpaceX Now Offers $60B to Buy the Company In April 2022, Cursor developer Anysphere completed a $400k Pre-Seed funding round, with Alameda investing $200k for approximately 5% of the shares. This equit - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE4wSlFZbjhKdmt3NHhtMXMtOWptcV9XMWs0cV9ucVdvZklFTUhmc3dRdXEwcF8tR3hldVZjeVVlZzVuZEZDNDZoV3BoU0o4OG9HaWNpYmFOdk9wR1Izc2JoSV9kTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">FTX Liquidators Sold Cursor Stak…

item.title: Justin Sun sues World Liberty Financial over token lockup
item.description: Sun said the suit is to protect his rights as a token holder, but he remains a supporter of President Donald Trump and his administration’s efforts to make the US crypto-friendly.

item.title: Inside the MAS Sandbox: How Ripple is testing RLUSD for real trade settlements
item.description: How Ripple is testing RLUSD in Singapore’s MAS sandbox to enable conditional trade settlements, and why this does not amount to full regulatory approval.

item.title: JUST IN: TRON Founder Justin Sun files lawsuit against Trump Family's crypto project World Liberty Financial. "They wrongfully froze all of my tokens, stripped me of my right to vote on governance proposals, and have threatened to permanently destroy my tok - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE0yeUVmTmNlQmlVMWM5VWdZLWFwYTViQjU4cmwtVlNlVGRDQU5HTUNlNVgtRnVqUDhtVlF2dHc4eU1RT3VFMGdNOU5rY3VnS2tOdFhab3N3TDNqWFVSS3hjWFVB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: TRON Founder Justin Sun f…

item.title: 🔥 BULLISH: Ethereum's institution-focused marketing arm Etherealize argues $ETH could surpass $250,000 if it captures the combined monetary premium of gold and Bitcoin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFAxcFlsajNEX2tnay0tQ09TbEgzaWlJRjROc0Y0VHlVMUcyb0otV2FlVEg0SVlDUTd0WHo3NHhWWWEzc01FUjhRdWJjUmhVTTNMZE92ai1vYWJXSjNlWk1lQVM1dnI?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BULLISH: Ethereum's institut…

item.title: US admiral calls Bitcoin an instrument for US ‘power projection’
item.description: US Navy Admiral Samuel Paparo said Bitcoin’s proof-of-work technology has "really important" computer science applications when it comes to cybersecurity.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Finds 271 Vulnerabilities in Firefox—Yes, It's Seriously Powerful
item.description: Anthropic’s powerful Claude Mythos AI model found hundreds of vulnerabilities in Mozilla Firefox, highlighting its cybersecurity potential.

item.title: Crypto's great hope in Senate's Clarity Act still has a path to survive tight calendar
item.description: A sideshow stablecoin yield debate has dragged the market structure bill through months of delay, even as the Senate's available floor time diminishes for 2026.

item.title: Inside the hunt for Satoshi: Filmmakers chase crypto’s biggest mystery
item.description: A new documentary digs into Bitcoin’s origins, reframing the search for Satoshi Nakamoto as both a technical investigation and a deeply human story.

item.title: Coinbase Flags Proof-of-Stake Chains Like Ethereum, Solana as Potential Quantum Risks
item.description: Advisory council says validator signatures and wallet cryptography could be vulnerable if future quantum computers break current encryption.

item.title: Core Scientific Reveals $3.3 Billion Junk-Bond Sale to Pivot Further from Bitcoin Mining to AI
item.description: Core Scientific, a Bitcoin miner turned data center operator, said that it plans to offer $3.3 billion worth of speculative-grade debt.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Kalshi mulls crypto expansion with perpetual futures launch: Report
item.description: According to reports, Kalshi plans to launch crypto perpetual futures, expanding beyond prediction markets as regulated derivatives offerings in the US continue to evolve.

item.title: New York sues Coinbase, Gemini over prediction market offerings
item.description: New York has become the latest state to argue that prediction market contracts touching on sports and entertainment violate state gambling laws.

item.title: Strategy Now Holds $62 Billion in Bitcoin—These Are Its Biggest BTC Buys
item.description: How did Michael Saylor's firm amass a record stash of Bitcoin? Here's a look back at how Strategy made such massive gains.

item.title: Revolut Targeting $200 Billion Valuation in IPO—But Not Until 2028: FT
item.description: Global fintech firm Revolut is eying a $200 billion IPO, according to a report—but don't expect the move any time soon.

item.title: Google Fixes AI Coding Tool Flaw That Let Attackers Execute Malicious Code: Report
item.description: Researchers say a prompt injection bug in Google's Antigravity AI coding tool could have let attackers run commands, despite safeguards.

item.title: THORChain was modelled after Bitcoin, to be permissionless and censorship resistant. There’s no single person or entity in control of the protocol. There’s no admin key. There’s no 2-of-3 multisig. Currently, there’s 95 nodes spread globally that control the net - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5ZSnBXYjUwOW5BczBlZkZGWWtpRGVwN3NQaEhMb1BxNHR0VDJvc2I5REpqQU04QkFUYXI1WnJLd1JzdUlzSUxmbnNyTTdJcWIyempaT3NXLXdmNHFjMG5Z?oc=5" target="_blank">THORChain was modelled after Bitcoin, …

item.title: DoorDash to offer stablecoin payments to users via Tempo blockchain
item.description: Tempo announced the integration of ”stablecoin-powered payment infrastructure” with DoorDash, Stripe, Paradigm, Coastal Bank and ARQ.

item.title: Prediction markets are the new secret weapon for Coinbase and Robinhood growth
item.description: Cantor Fitzgerald analysts said the market is treating recent trading slumps as old news, shifting focus instead toward prediction markets and new product launches to drive the next leg of growth for Coinbase and Robinhood.

item.title: Blockchain.com adds perpetual futures trading to self-custody wallets
item.description: With a CFTC greenlight expected soon, industry momentum is building for the derivative contracts still only available to non-US investors.

item.title: Prediction Market Giants Kalshi, Polymarket Eye Perpetual Futures Push: Report
item.description: The leading prediction market firms are reportedly planning to push deeper into derivatives by supporting perpetual futures trading.

item.title: Core Scientific seeks $3.3 billion bond sale to further AI data center pivot
item.description: The company is building six AI data centers, leased to CoreWeave for 12 years, and is expected to generate approximately $10 billion in revenue.

item.title: Mob boss John Gotti’s grandson is headed to prison for a $1.1 million Covid fraud and crypto scheme
item.description: he mob boss’ grandson defrauded the U.S. government’s Covid-19 relief system out of $1.1 million and invested at least half of it to invest in crypto businesses.

item.title: Tether Asserts Stablecoin Dominance Over Circle's USDC Amid Major Crypto Hacks
item.description: Tether's USDT market cap hit an all-time high, with DeFi users appearing to favor the stablecoin over USDC as a refuge from industry fallout.

item.title: Mississippi Law School Requires AI Training as Courts Grapple With the Tech
item.description: Mississippi College School of Law now mandates artificial intelligence education for first-year students as legal institutions adapt to both the risks and potential uses of the technology.

item.title: LATEST: Crypto's massive exploit may force big banks to rethink their blockchain plans, Jefferies warns. @HeleneBraunn reports - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5wQ3ZnR0lMZFlRZnFTOExPOUVyRjRGRWRYWEY3WWdlVUZVdGFSVVBIMHVGWU5tVDYtZFh2WV9XRFFjNVlLSUgwNGQ4dHF5T1hKRlRSVExaUmZ5bnEtblE?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: Crypto's massive exploit may fo…

item.title: Crypto's massive exploit may force big banks to rethink their blockchain plans, Jefferies warns
item.description: The $293 million Kelp DAO exploit has exposed critical infrastructure risks, leading Jefferies to suggest that traditional financial firms may pause their blockchain initiatives to prioritize security.

item.title: Quantum computers can't break your crypto yet. We want to make sure it stays that way. We assembled a board of researchers from Stanford, UT Austin, and the Ethereum Foundation to figure this out years before it matters. Their first paper is out now ↓ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFA5MWg1LUp0QnNLWExEaUVpV3FTV0lvVHMyRFhOMFhadW1UVW95Sl9lTjhHRWRGbFNlZE5zRzJqY0VlN0sydGxsX2gzcHc2a3ZxaHRBQlNHOUVkMHp3eGc?oc=5" target="_blank">Quantum computers can't break your cryp…

item.title: Bitcoin inflows to Binance fall to 2023 low as BTC bulls set target on $80K
item.description: Bitcoin inflows diverge across exchanges as selling pressure eases on Binance, while Coinbase shows more dominant activity.

item.title: This Frankenstein AI Merges Claude Opus, GLM and Qwen—And Outperforms Top Models
item.description: Kyle Hessling stacked two of Jackrong's Qwopus finetunes into a single frankenmerge'—and then had to heal it. The result outperforms some of the top models.

item.title: New York targets Coinbase, Gemini in fresh crackdown on prediction markets
item.description: Attorney General Letitia James alleged that Coinbase and Gemini ran unlicensed markets, adding pressure on crypto companies as states move to regulate event-based trading platforms.

item.title: Bitcoin slides toward $75,000 amid Warsh hearing, stalling U.S.-Iran talks
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq gave back their early morning gains alongside BTC as markets digested the Fed Chair nominee's Senate confirmation hearing and report of stalled Iran talks.

item.title: New York Sues Coinbase and Gemini Over Prediction Markets, Seeking Billions in Damages
item.description: "Gemini and Coinbase’s so-called prediction markets are just illegal gambling operations," alleged New York AG Letitia James.

item.title: Kalshi takes on Coinbase, Robinhood with new plan to offer crypto perpetual futures: The Information
item.description: Prediction market platform Kalshi is moving onto Coinbase’s turf by launching crypto perpetual futures, aiming to capture the massive demand for digital asset derivatives within a regulated U.S. framework.
